description: Lists channels in a Microsoft Team (Graph GET /teams/{team-id}/channels). Responses include @odata.nextLink when paginated—pass it back as odata_next_link. On continuation requests, team_id is optional (it is already in odata_next_link).

team_id.description: Team (group) id from teams_list_teams or teams_search_teams. Required on the first page unless odata_next_link is set.

odata_next_link.description: Pagination: copy the full @odata.nextLink value from the previous response body (verbatim).

top.description: First-page page size ($top). Ignored when odata_next_link is provided.
